pkgmetadata.longdescription: Alternative implementation of NVIDIA's NVAPI library for use with DXVK and Wine. Enables DLSS, NVIDIA Reflex, low-latency frame generation, ray tracing and Optical Flow API features in Windows games running through Wine. The same component is bundled with Proton and Proton-GE; this standalone package targets plain wine-vanilla / wine-staging setups.

use.flag: Use sys-devel/crossdev for the toolchain rather than dev-util/mingw64-toolchain (requires manual setup and is mostly unsupported, try disabling if you have issues)
